patch.value: pm search --status filter (parity with pm list)
pm list has --status; pm search has --type/--tag/--priority/--deadline but no --status, so search includes closed history noise by default. Add status parity.
pm search --status <csv> (open/closed/canceled aliases) applied pre-query; emitted in filters; CLI+contracts+MCP+completions+docs+tests; reuse list status parsing.
